No. 1572/2014-Estt IV.—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (IVof Section 84 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (Act 6 of 2014), the Central Government hereby constitutes Apex Council consisting of— (a) Minister of Water Resources, Government of India —Chairperson; (b) Chief Minister of State of Andhra Pradesh —Member; (c) Chief Minister of State of Telangana —Member for the supervision of the functioning of the Godavari River Management Board and Krishna River Management Board with effect from 2nd June, 2014. URVILLA KHATI, Jt. vfHk;ark ls vU;wu ugha gksxk 2 . xksnkojh unh izca/k cksMZ dk e q [ ; k y ; gSnjkckn gksxk A & v/;{k & l n L ; & l n L ; & l n L ; l f p o (iw.kZdkfyd) [Qk- la- 1@1@2014&,lihvkj] mfoZyk [kkrh, la;qDr l f p o 2216 GI/2014 (1) -- 2 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th May, 2014 S.O. 1403(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1), (4) and (5) of Section 85 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (6 of 2014), the Central Government hereby constitutes the Godavari River Management Board for the administration, regulation, maintenance and operation of such projects on Godavari river, as may be notified by the Central Government from time to time, consisting of the following Chairperson and Members, namely:— (1) An officer of the level of Additional Secretary to the Government of India from the Central Water Engineering (Group ‘A’) Service (2) Two members, to be nominated by each of the successor States of Telangana and Andhra Pradesh, of which one shall be the technical member not below the rank of Chief Engineer and the other administrative member to represent the concerned States (3) One expert from the Central Power Engineering (Group ‘A’) Service (4) An Officer not below the rank of Chief Engineer from the Central Water Engineering (Group ‘A’) Service Chairperson Members Members Member Secretary 2. The headquarters of the Godavari River Management Board shall be at Hyderabad. [File No.1/1/2014-SPR] URVILLA KHATI, Jt.
